description_long: This is a rustic wooden fence composed of three vertical posts connected by two horizontal rails. The rails are slightly uneven and have a natural, hand-hewn appearance, giving the fence a traditional and organic look. The wood is a medium brown color, with visible grain and texture, suggesting it is untreated or minimally finished. The fence is open between the rails, allowing visibility and airflow, and is likely used for demarcating boundaries in parks, gardens, or along sidewalks. There are no visible decorative elements or post caps, emphasizing its utilitarian design. The overall structure is lightweight and could be moved or repositioned if necessary.
description: A rustic, brown wooden fence with three posts and two uneven horizontal rails, featuring a natural, hand-hewn look and no decorative elements.
description_view_0: The fence is seen from the end, appearing as a thin vertical line with minimal visible detail.
description_view_1: The full length of the fence is visible, showing three posts and two horizontal rails with a natural, uneven shape.
description_view_2: The fence is viewed from the opposite end, again appearing as a thin vertical line.
description_view_3: The fence is shown from the back, similar to view 1, with the same three posts and two rails visible.
